mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.nickname FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.book_id = #{bookId} AND r.is_deleted = false ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT r.*, u.nickname FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.review_id = #{reviewId}
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET content = #{content}, rating = #{rating}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
UPDATE reviews SET is_deleted = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
